instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
output: En el principio era la Palabra, y la Palabra estaba con Dios, y la Palabra era Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He was in the beginning with God.
output: Esta estaba en el principio con Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: All things came into being through Him, and apart from Him not one thing came into being which has come into being.
output: Todas las cosas por medio de ella llegaron a existir, y aparte de ella ni una sola cosa llegó a existir de lo que ha llegado a existir.
